name: software-project
description: Discovery and design process for general software projects (the non-AI counterpart to ai-project): requirements gathering captured as working markdown in docs/ (the source of truth), with the document package rendered at each review gate (design and delivery) by the project's chosen document style pack (default generic-docx; or your own). Gate-aware taxonomy with the LLD at the design gate. Provides /new-software-project and /render-gate-package, the software-design-docs skill, discovery (reasoning model) and gate-renderer (Sonnet) agents, and a design-reviewer agent. Hands off to loop-harness for implementation.
